channel.title: GlobalSentry Ecological Threat Feed
channel.description: Real-time updates on global ecological threats and environmental emergencies.

item.title: Deforestation in Amazon Basin reported by ReliefWeb
item.description: GlobalSentry Ecological Threat Feed - Monitoring global environmental threats and ecological crises.
